activities.title: 2nd Place – Spaghetti Bridge Competition 2024
activities.location: Faculty of Engineering, University of Ruhuna
activities.description: Achieved 2nd place in the Spaghetti Bridge Competition 2024 organized by the Civil & Environmental Engineering Society (CEES), Faculty of Engineering, University of Ruhuna. This competition involved designing and constructing a spaghetti bridge to test structural strength, load carrying capacity, material efficiency and teamwork. The achievement demonstrates practical understanding of structural behaviour, creativity, problem solving and civil engineering design principles.

activities.title: Career Catalyst 2024
activities.location: Faculty of Engineering, University of Ruhuna
activities.description: Recognized for my active participation and contribution to Career Catalyst 2024, highlighting teamwork, coordination, responsibility and involvement in professional development activities.

sectionDescription: A collection of events, competitions, workshops, academic activities, and professional engagements I have participated in.
